purpose_context: Before TeamSpace public launch, every active Spec Kitty repository must have its historical mission-state data audited, deterministically repaired, and dry-run validated against the current event contract. This mission coordinates running the doctor mission-state pipeline across spec-kitty, spec-kitty-saas, and spec-kitty-events, landing a standalone repair commit per repo, and closing issue #979.
purpose_tldr: Audit and repair historical mission-state artifacts across active repos so TeamSpace public launch can proceed with zero blockers.
